zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Fitzlangley於大約1395年出生在英國艾可馬爾頓時，她的父親Henry Fillongley27歲，母親Alice de Hungerford26歲。她於大約1412年與John Ungoe在英國英格蘭艾可馬爾頓結婚。她去世於1448年在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國艾可馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Fitzlangley was born about 1395, in Maldon, Essex, England, her father, Henry Fillongley, was 27 and her mother, Alice de Hungerford, was 26. She married John Ungoe about 1412, in Maldon, Essex, England, United Kingdom. She died in 1448, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Maldon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Fitzlangley est née environ 1395, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Henry Fillongley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice de Hungerford, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Ungoe environ 1412, à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée en 1448, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Maldon, Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Fitzlangleyが約1395年にイギリスエセックスマルドンで生まれた時，父Henry Fillongleyは27歳，母Alice de Hungerfordは26歳であった。約1412年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマルドンでJohn Ungoeと結婚した。彼女は1448年に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスマルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Fitzlangley(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 에세스 맬던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Fillongley(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Hungerford(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 맬던에서 John Ungoe(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1448년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 맬던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Fitzlangley nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Fillongley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Hungerford, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John Ungoe aproximadamente 1412, em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 1448, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Maldon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Fitzlangley родилась около 1395 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Fillongley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Hungerford, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Ungoe около 1412 г. в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла в 1448 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности малдон, эссекс, Англия.
